zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Hopton於大約1385年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親Thomas Hopton26歲，母親Anna Rockell24歲。他和Katherine Lloyd至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Hopton于大约1385年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，他的父亲Thomas Hopton26岁，母亲Anna Rockell24岁。他和Katherine Lloyd至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Hopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hopton, such as those in Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk, from Old English hop ‘remote enclosed place’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Hopton was born about 1385, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Hopton, was 26 and his mother, Anna Rockell, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Katherine Lloyd.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Hopton est né environ 1385, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hopton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Rockell, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Katherine Lloyd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Hopton um 1385 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hopton 26 und seine Mutter Anna Rockell 24. Er hatte mit Katherine Lloyd mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Hopton è nato il circa 1385 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Hopton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anna Rockell, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Katherine Lloyd.

ja.Rockhill, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Hoptonが約1385年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Hoptonは26歳，母Anna Rockellは24歳であった。彼はKatherine Lloydとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Hopton(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hopton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Rockell(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Katherine Lloyd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Hopton nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hopton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anna Rockell, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Katherine Lloyd.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Hopton родился около 1385 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Hopton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Rockell, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Katherine Lloyd.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Hopton nació aproximadamente 1385, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hopton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anna Rockell, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Katherine Lloyd.
